panels.title: Cpu Usage
panels.description: Overall non-idle CPU percentage averaged across cores.

panels.title: Memory Usage
panels.description: Used memory as a percentage of total memory.

panels.title: Swap Usage
panels.description: Used swap as a percentage of total swap.

panels.title: Cpu By Core
panels.description: Per-core non-idle CPU percentage over time.

panels.title: Cpu Irq
panels.description: IRQ + softirq share as a percentage of total CPU time.

panels.title: Process Read Latency Proxy
panels.description: No direct per-process latency metric is exported. This proxy shows average bytes per read syscall.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_disk_io_bytes_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="read"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_io_syscalls_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="read"}[5m])), 1e-9))

panels.title: Process Write Latency Proxy
panels.description: No direct per-process latency metric is exported. This proxy shows average bytes per write syscall.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_disk_io_bytes_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="write"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_io_syscalls_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="write"}[5m])), 1e-9))

panels.title: Runqueue Depth per CPU (approx)
panels.description: Per-CPU runqueue depth approximation derived from schedstat weighting and runnable load.

panels.title: Filesystem Used % by Mount
panels.description: Filesystem occupancy based on statvfs total and used bytes.

panels.title: Top Slab Caches (active objects)

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (cache) (system_linux_slab{instance=~"$instance",key="active_objs"})) or label_replace(sum by (instance) (system_memory_slab_bytes{instance=~"$instance"}), "cache", "total_slab_bytes", "instance", ".*")

panels.description: Top slab caches by active objects when available; falls back to total slab bytes when per-cache data is unavailable due kernel permissions.

panels.title: Cgroup CPU Throttling (rate)

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (instance, scope) (rate(system_linux_cgroup{instance=~"$instance",section="cpu.stat",key="nr_throttled"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (instance, scope) (rate(system_linux_cgroup{instance=~"$instance",section="cpu.stat",key="nr_periods"}[5m])), 1e-9)

panels.description: cgroup v2 throttling across scopes: A=throttle events/sec, B=throttled periods percent.
